title: Backend API for POS operations
description: Build FastAPI backend APIs for product management, cart operations, and sales processing using PostgreSQL for data storage and Pydantic for validation.
acceptance_criteria: Product CRUD APIs (create, read, update, delete) work correctly.
Cart management APIs (add item, remove item, update quantity, clear cart) work.
Checkout API processes a sale and records the transaction.
All APIs handle validation and return appropriate error messages.

title: Web Frontend for POS operations
description: Develop a React TypeScript web application for cashiers to manage products, build customer carts, and process sales, integrating with the backend APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Product catalog is displayed and searchable.
Cashier can add/remove products to/from a cart and adjust quantities.
Real-time display of cart total and line item totals.
Checkout flow allows processing a sale.
Frontend communicates with the backend APIs for all operations.

title: Automated Testing and Docker Deployment Setup
description: Implement automated unit and integration tests for both backend (Pytest) and frontend (Jest), and set up Docker Compose for local development and deployment.
acceptance_criteria: Docker Compose successfully builds and runs all services (backend, frontend, database).
Backend unit tests (Pytest) achieve at least 80% coverage.
Frontend unit tests (Jest) achieve at least 80% coverage.
Integration tests verify communication between frontend and backend.
CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions) runs tests on push.
